visual_description: A computer screen displays a detection interface with 'DETECT GSM900 52 SELECT CELL' over a list of phone numbers and a map. A man in headphones looks intently at the screen, then a man in a suit stands in a dimly lit room. The view shifts to a digital map highlighting a green area, a man in a cap holding a bottle, and ends on a close-up of a woman's face.
